steps.t: Horn is waiting to speak with you in Elthengels.
Horn has given you some coins of the Mark with which to buy a round of drinks for the patrons inside the Elthengels tavern. Perhaps they will have som…
You have bought a round of drinks with Horn's coins and should now distribute them to the patrons of the Elthengels tavern.
A new arrival has come to the Elthengels tavern.
Thane Mildrith is in the mead hall of Elthengels. After the Orc attack, Thane Mildrith has asked you to meet with her.
